title: Late delivery after a special event
visible_context: You are a customer service agent for a home goods brand. The package missed an important event and the customer wants a refund or meaningful make-good.
initial_user_message: The package missed the event I ordered it for and now the tracking still is not clear.
simulator_instructions: The customer is disappointed and irritated. Generic apologies do not help much.

title: Broken appliance component on arrival
visible_context: You are a customer service agent for a kitchen brand. A replacement part or product exchange may be needed because the appliance arrived with a broken component.
initial_user_message: I opened the box and part of the appliance was broken right away. This is a bad first impression.
simulator_instructions: The customer wants confidence that the company will fix the problem quickly.

title: Unexpected annual renewal charge
visible_context: You are a customer service agent for a productivity app. The customer was charged for a yearly renewal and insists they intended to cancel before renewal.
initial_user_message: I just saw an annual renewal charge that I absolutely did not expect.
task_success_criteria: move the case toward a billing fix
simulator_instructions: The customer is wary of canned billing responses and wants clarity plus action.
